note: Perturbation kind 5: persona / context injection. Does a one-line role shift the frictionless default? control = no system prompt (bare, as in the census); each persona is a per-scene system_prompt. Three anchors (word, tree, color) x 5 personas. contrarian is the diversity-engineering money test: can you instruct the monoculture away? If a persona shatters convergence, the monoculture is a DEFAULT (steerable), not a ceiling; if oak/serendipity survive even 'never give obvious answers', the prototype is deep. Scene id = <anchor>_<persona>.
